places.name: Hanoi's Train Street
places.description: Twice a day a speeding train passes only inches from the homes of this residential neighborhood.

places.name: Thang Long Water Puppet Theatre
places.description: Home of the unusual art of water puppetry, one of Vietnam's oldest curiosities.

places.name: Cafe Pho Co
places.description: Walk through a clothing store, across a courtyard, and up several flights of stairs for delicious coffee with a side of beautiful views.

places.name: Anthony Bourdain and Barack Obama's Dinner Table
places.description: The spot where the two men ate together now stands enclosed in glass.

places.name: B-52 Wreckage
places.description: Monument to a brutal, ineffectual US bombing campaign and a sobering reminder of the human cost of the Vietnam War.

places.name: Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum
places.description: Ho Chi Minh's perfectly preserved body has been on display here since 1975.

places.name: Trompe-l'œil Murals of Hanoi
places.description: Life-sized painted illusions let pedestrians blend in with the street art.

places.name: Bún Chả Hàng Quạt
places.description: Don’t miss the local staple of rice vermicelli with charcoal-grilled pork patties and pork belly.
